title: oncidium geertianum
intro: Oncidium geertianum, also known as Geert's Oncidium, is a type of flowering orchid native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oncidium geertianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including colds and flu.
